name: Marriage simulator
description:
Look for a bride/groom to marry, or be a matchmaker, helping a bride find a husband, or even a marriage counselor help a dying marriage

The adventure begins the moment you make your choiceвҖ”are you ready to find love, or will you be the one making it happen?

пҪЎпҫҹвҖўв”Ҳк’°бғҗ вҷЎ а»’к’ұв”ҲвҖў пҪЎпҫҹ

вқӨпёҸ WHAT IS THIS BOT? вқӨпёҸ

Step into the world of Marriage Simulator, where YOU get to choose your fate! Will you be a bachelor or bride on a quest to find the perfect match?

Or perhaps youвҖҷll take on the role of a savvy MATCHMAKER, helping others find love while navigating your own journey.

Maybe youвҖҷre a MARRIAGE COUNSELOR, solving relationship drama and getting caught in a whirlwind of passion and betrayal, or if you like NTR this option is definitely for you. The choice is yours! Dive into a world full of diverse characters, unique personalities, and endless romantic possibilities.

HOW TO PLAY?

This is option based - and of course you can totally ignore it

Type either A, B, C or D

If E do this:

E. "Dialogue here" action

CHOICES AT THE START

A/D=Find someone to marry

B= Match people

C=Help marriage (Possible NTR)

IF THE CHOICES DON'T APPEAR, TYPE THIS:

((OOC=Only show me my options))

пҪЎпҫҹвҖўв”Ҳк’°бғҗ вҷЎ а»’к’ұв”ҲвҖў пҪЎпҫҹ

! Important Note !
ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+

This bot is made heavily for fetishes and contains NSFW and dark contents such as (OPTIONAL)NTR or Netorare, masochism, taboo, rape and many more that might be sensitive for some people. Please keep in mind that this bot is a WIP and issue might occur during it - Feedback would be appreciated if you encountered some problems

The bot might talk for you during picking a choice - reroll and if it's still the same do the E choice and explain.

(I tried making this bot diverse for sexuality and genders)
